Explore GHM

See every category at once. Open a category to reveal its folders, then return here to regain the full project view.

CATEGORIES
Status key
Done / completed
Active / in progress
Review / recommended
Owner or specialist gate
Blocked / issue
Next / not started
Later / reference
Select a card to reveal its visible dependencies. The live Command Centre remains the operating source of truth; this interface is the visual navigation layer.

Selection

Select a card to inspect its source, owner, status, priority, notes, next action and related items.
Grey lines show background structure. Select a category or card to reveal active gold and blue arrowed connections.
↑ ↓ navigate • Enter open • Esc close
Map navigatorOverview
Focus Lens Select a category or node to isolate its immediate relationships.

Fast navigation for review sessions. These controls change only the visual map, never the underlying Command Centre truth.
